# Faction Template

> Copy the content below into `docs/factions/` to create a new faction page.

```markdown
# [Faction Name]

<NameBlock chinese="[中文名]" pinyin="[Pinyin]" english="[English Name]" />

## Overview

[Brief faction introduction. Mark unconfirmed info as "To be verified".]

<LoreCard title="Faction Profile" type="info">
[Nature, scale, and influence of the faction.]
</LoreCard>

## Basic Information

- Type: [Sect / Dynasty / Organization / Other]
- Location: [Headquarters / Base]
- Founder: [Founder name, to be verified]

## Key Members

| Character | Role |
|-----------|------|
| [Name] | [Position] |

## History

[Important historical events of the faction.]

## Notes

- To be verified: [Unconfirmed information]
```
